ad_copy.headline: Software, Simplified.
ad_copy.subheadline: Unlock your potential with Test Brand.
ad_copy.body_copy: Introducing the software you've been waiting for. Streamline your workflow, boost productivity, and achieve more. Learn more and start your free trial today!

variations.label: Variation A - Primary
variations.headline: Software, Simplified.
variations.body_copy: Introducing the software you've been waiting for. Streamline your workflow, boost productivity, and achieve more. Learn more and start your free trial today!

variations.label: Variation B - Emotional
variations.headline: Less Stress, More Success.
variations.body_copy: Imagine a world where your software works *for* you, not against you. Test Brand empowers you to achieve your goals with ease. Start your free trial now!

variations.label: Variation C - Direct
variations.headline: New Software is Here!
variations.body_copy: Test Brand is launching! Get ready to experience a new level of efficiency and control. Claim your free trial and see the difference.

visual_direction.layout_description: A clean, modern design with a central, eye-catching graphic representing the software's core function (e.g., a simplified workflow diagram, a stylized data visualization). The background should be a gradient of the primary brand colors, subtly transitioning from red to green.
visual_direction.composition: The central graphic dominates the frame, positioned slightly off-center to create visual interest. Text overlays are placed strategically to avoid obscuring the graphic, using a clear hierarchy. The CTA button is prominently displayed in the bottom right corner.
visual_direction.color_usage: The primary brand colors (#FF0000 and #00FF00) are used as a gradient background and accent colors in the graphic and CTA button. White text provides strong contrast for readability.
visual_direction.typography_usage: Headline in bold Arial, 72pt. Subheadline in regular Arial, 36pt. Body copy in regular Arial, 18pt. CTA in bold Arial, 24pt. Consistent font usage throughout.
visual_direction.imagery_style: Clean, minimalist, and professional. Avoid overly complex or distracting imagery. Focus on conveying clarity and efficiency.

image_generation_prompt.stable_diffusion: A clean, minimalist illustration of a simplified workflow diagram, using interconnected circles and arrows, representing software efficiency. Gradient background transitioning from bright red (#FF0000) to vibrant green (#00FF00). Modern, professional aesthetic. 1:1 aspect ratio, 1080x1080 pixels. High resolution.
image_generation_prompt.midjourney: /imagine A clean, minimalist illustration of a simplified workflow diagram, interconnected circles and arrows, software efficiency, gradient background red (#FF0000) to green (#00FF00), modern, professional aesthetic --ar 1:1 --v 5
image_generation_prompt.negative_prompt: photorealistic, blurry, cluttered, complex, text, watermark, signature

zones.middle: Central graphic (workflow diagram), Subheadline (Unlock your potential with Test Brand.)
zones.bottom: Body copy (Introducing the software...), CTA button (Try Free)

layout_spec.spacing_notes: Maintain consistent padding around all elements. Safe zone: 50px from all edges. Ensure sufficient spacing between the graphic and text overlays.

brand_compliance_notes: The campaign adheres to brand guidelines by utilizing the primary brand colors, Arial typography, and a professional, trustworthy tone of voice. The minimalist visual aesthetic reinforces the brand's commitment to simplicity and efficiency.
ab_testing_tips: A/B test different headlines to see which resonates best with the audience. Experiment with different CTA button colors and text. Test different variations of the central graphic to optimize for engagement.
